headerDescription: Crafting premium digital experiences through minimal design and performant code.

projects.title: Work
projects.description: A collection of digital solutions where design meets functionality to create impactful user experiences.

resume.title: Resume-inline
resume.description: Initially, it is conceived as a personal project, with the aim of learning new technologies and improving my skills as a frontend developer. It is a web application that allows users to create their resume quickly and easily by interacting with a user-friendly interface.

chart.title: Chart Library
chart.description: Line chart library built with React. It is a simple and easy-to-use library that allows you to create beautiful and interactive line charts. It is designed to be flexible and customizable, so you can easily adapt it to your needs.

esphin.title: Esphin
esphin.description: Portfolio for my personal software consultancy project. We offer application development, custom solutions, and digital transformation for businesses.

esphinCV.title: EsphinCV
esphinCV.description: Smart AI-powered resume builder. PDF import, section optimization, and premium templates to stand out professionally.

skills.title: Skills
skills.description: A curated stack of modern technologies focused on performance, scalability, and pixel-perfect design.

about.title: About
about.skillsDescription: Profound expertise in frontend technologies, complemented by a solid track record in developing high-performance web applications and crafting intuitive user interfaces.
